$description.$value: Navigation color tokens. Used for top navigation bar, left navigation panel, and tab components. Emphasis mode (high/low) has no effect — navigation items use a single color scale based on the brand red palette.

fg_base.$description: Navigation foreground — text. Always uses the highest contrast cobalt value; navigation text is black regardless of lightness mode.

fg_disabled.$description: Navigation foreground — disabled. Muted text/icon color using the universal cobalt disabled scale.

contrast_high.$description: Navigation background — high contrast. Applies where a strong surface fill is required (e.g. pressed, selected).

contrast_medium.$description: Navigation background — medium contrast. Applies in hover and focus states for a visible but non-dominant surface.

contrast_low.$description: Navigation background — low contrast. Applies in enabled state for a subtle surface that does not dominate the layout.

solid.$description: Navigation background — disabled solid. Opaque muted surface for disabled navigation items.

opacity.$description: Navigation background — disabled opacity. Semi-transparent muted surface for disabled navigation items.

brand.$description: Navigation border — brand. Uses ob.p.color.basic.federal_red. Applied to selected and pressed states as the primary brand indicator line.

subtle.$description: Navigation border — subtle. Lighter red shade for non-active borders (enabled, hover, focus states).

disabled.$description: Navigation border — disabled. Muted border using the cobalt_alpha disabled scale.
